{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Makiel's lair
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel's lair]] is a huge room with tiles marked in a circle of runes to focus sight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
